steps.title: Parallel lines → same slope
steps.content: Read slope of line $r$ directly from $6x - 5y = 6$: rearrange → $y = \frac{6}{5}x - \frac{6}{5}$, so slope $= \frac{6}{5}$.

steps.title: Apply parallel rule
steps.content: Line $s$ is parallel to line $r$, so it has the same slope: $\frac{6}{5}$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
